[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="rgba(224,163,192,0.2)" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="1" custom_padding_last_edited="off|tablet" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" background_color="#000000" custom_padding="0px||0px||true|false" custom_padding_tablet="30px||0px|0px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="0px|0px|0px||true|false" custom_css_main_element="display: flex;||align-items: center;" global_colors_info="{}" custom_css_main_element_last_edited="on|tablet" custom_css_main_element_tablet="display: flex;||flex-direction: column;" custom_css_main_element_phone="display: flex;||flex-direction: column;"][et_pb_column type="3_5" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="|||30px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="30px|30px|||false|false" custom_padding_phone="30px|30px|||false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_heading title="Must-Have Pieces" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" title_level="h2" title_font="Merriweather||||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="38px" custom_margin="||10px||false|false" title_font_size_tablet="34px" title_font_size_phone="28px" title_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_heading][dipl_tabs tab_trigger="click" fullwidth_tabs="on" content_bg_color="#e03c86" active_tab_background_color="#e03c86" tab_background_color="#FFFFFF" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" active_title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_text_color="#000000" title_font="||||||||" body_text_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size_tablet="" title_font_size_phone="16px" title_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_tabs_item title="Casual Wear" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Casual wear is all about comfort and simplicity, perfect for everyday activities. Whether you're running errands or hanging out with friends, this style is easygoing and versatile. It includes relaxed clothing that you can wear on a day-to-day basis without compromising on style.

Style Tip:
For a trendy yet casual look, pair a graphic tee with high-waisted jeans and chunky sneakers. Add a cozy cardigan or bomber jacket for cooler days.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Streetwear" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Streetwear has become a dominant style, blending urban influences with high fashion. Born from skate culture, hip-hop, and street art, this style is bold, expressive, and often incorporates oversized silhouettes, graphic prints, and limited-edition sneaker culture.

Style Tip:
Embrace oversized hoodies with distressed jeans and high-top sneakers. Layer with a statement jacket or bomber for extra style points.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Boho Style" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Bohemian fashion is all about a free-spirited, carefree aesthetic, combining vintage, eclectic, and earthy elements. Think flowing fabrics, natural tones, and ethnic-inspired patterns. This style often reflects a love for travel, art, and individuality.

Style Tip:
Pair a flowy maxi skirt with a cropped boho top and gladiator sandals. Complete the look with layered necklaces and oversized sunglasses for a laid-back yet stylish vibe.

[/dipl_tabs_item][dipl_tabs_item title="Formal Wear" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"]

Business or corporate wear is designed to project professionalism and authority while ensuring you feel confident and polished. This style is defined by tailored fits, structured garments, and a more formal color palette, perfect for office settings and corporate meetings.

Style Tip:
For a sharp, professional look, pair a tailored blazer with a button-down shirt and straight-leg trousers. Add classic pumps or leather loafers to complete the outfit.

[/dipl_tabs_item][/dipl_tabs][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/man-person-team.webp?_t=1731478854" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
